subcodes.first_line: In these days the emigrant unto God hath arrived and made mention of thee in the presence of this Wronged One, and this Tablet from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این ایام مهاجر الی الله وارد و در ساحت مظلوم ذکر شما را نمود و این لوح از
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
